---
title: "\'Harvest Home in Normandy\' Translated by the Author of the \'Heir of Redclyffe\' from the French of Mde de Witt nee Guizot in Warne\'s Home Annual"
---

## \'Harvest Home in Normandy\' Translated by the Author of the \'Heir of Redclyffe\' from the French of Mde de Witt nee Guizot in Warne\'s Home Annual

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1868
**Genre:** translation
**Format:** story in collection

**Publisher:** London: Warne

### Notes

<i>Warne\'s Home Annual</i> ed. Laura Valentine

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
